items.comment: Smoke test: verificar que este numero es correcto contra panel M1M2 canonico (136 casos, 2002-2024, 21 comunas)

items.selected_text: three-tier early warning system for Andes virus HCPS
items.comment: Smoke test 2: sugerir mejorar la introduccion con datos PAHO 2025 mas recientes

items.selected_text: Recent hantavirus EWS include Kazasidis et al. (2024 Sci Rep), who reached 82.8% accuracy
items.comment: COMPARISON SHARPENING: This comparison paragraph is currently descriptive. Strengthen by making explicit WHY our approach is superior: (1) Kazasidis uses retrospective accuracy not out-of-sample probabilistic scoring rules, (2) our walk-forward 14-fold validation is strictly out-of-sample vs their cross-validation, (3) our three-tier framework provides graded operational response vs their binary alert. Use active voice. This is where EID reviewers will judge novelty contribution. Keep exact word count.

items.selected_text: Our pre-registered three-tier EWS achieves substantial skill against the PAHO endemic-channel
items.comment: REVIEWER ANTICIPATION: Opening Discussion paragraph. A reviewer will ask: 'How does BSS 68.1% compare to published benchmarks in infectious disease forecasting?' Preemptively address by noting that Fox et al. 2024 EID reported BSS range 40-65% for dengue in Brazil, making our 68.1% competitive. Also preempt: 'Is log score primary a departure from Brier tradition?' by briefly noting Gneiting-Raftery 2007 establishes log score as strictly proper. Active voice, confident but measured tone. Keep word count stable.
